Project log

Project is done in collaboration with Markku Varjosalo lab, Ada and Ziqi selected the samples - from SPACE and Ada’a CellCycle-IDS projects.

27.6.

27.6.

Joonas selected and collected 10 PDS ascites supernatant samples for Varjosalo lab - 32_ascites_samples_sent_summer_2025

Joonas selected and collected 10 PDS ascites supernatant samples for Varjosalo lab - 32_ascites_samples_sent_summer_2025

5 HRD and 5 HRP samples, highest tumor purities possible, low/no blood in ascites. Samples thawed, 100 µl aliquot taken to 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102 in CC hood, and refrozen in -80 in preparation for delivery on 30.6.

5 HRD and 5 HRP samples, highest tumor purities possible, low/no blood in ascites. Samples thawed, 100 µl aliquot taken to 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102 in CC hood, and refrozen in -80 in preparation for delivery on 30.6.

Started: March 2025 - Anastasia submitted 20mg of 96xFF tissues for proteomics analysis, in 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102, provided by Markku.
